checks.question: Open `data/source-files/Bestand_Kontext.ifc` in Bonsai/IfcOpenShell or equivalent and confirm the semantic tree loads without import errors.
checks.evidence_hint: IfcOpenShell machine import passed 13/13; visual Bonsai-style tree review remains human.

checks.question: Confirm whether 2 IFCBUILDINGELEMENTPROXY objects are acceptable as semantic Bestand/context elements or need reclassification.
Confirm all 2 elements belong to IFCBUILDINGSTOREY #4 Level 0 and there are no missing/extra storeys.
Confirm object placements and project units match the expected meter-based project context.
checks.evidence_hint: 2 elements have object placement; geometry extents are 10 x 8 x 3.35 m.

checks.question: Compare the semantic IFC import against DXF underlay, IFC bounds and LV95/project origin.
checks.evidence_hint: Alignment hint: missing_dxf_source; center offset estimate 0 m.

checks.question: Inspect large footprint/height outliers in the geometry preview before trusting the IFC as a design seed.
checks.evidence_hint: 12 faces resolved; inspect SVG preview and element samples.

checks.question: Check `Pset_AtelierBlaupause_Object` fields such as OBJEKTART, DACH_MIN, DACH_MAX and gml_id for reliability.
Review the generated Mass/material_unknown layer plan and decide whether finer wall/slab/roof/support classes are possible.
checks.evidence_hint: 5 generated layer groups; approved_for_import is false.

checks.question: Open the audited Blender review blend and visually confirm it is only a locked reference underlay.
Only after the checks above: decide keep as source review, accept as context, reject or approve as design seed.
